title: lithocarpus brachyacanthus
intro: Lithocarpus brachyacanthus, also known as the Lithocarpus tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. Lithocarpus brachyacanthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
